description: S1 Liquidity Vacuum V2 - CONFLUENCE MODE: Probabilistic 3-of-4 scoring instead of binary hard gates
_confluence_goal: Reduce brittleness via probabilistic scoring - catch FTX-like edge cases where 3/4 signals strong
_confluence_design: 3 of 4 conditions pass = signal (75% confidence) + weighted scoring for final fusion

liquidity_vacuum._robustness_gain: FTX: depth=-26.8% (PASS), crisis=0.303 (WEAK), vol=0.328 (PASS), wick=0.210 (PASS) → 3/4 conditions → DETECT
liquidity_vacuum._expected_impact: Catches edge cases where one signal weak but 3 others strong
liquidity_vacuum._comment_base_thresholds: Base thresholds (same as quick_fix - kept for binary evaluation)
liquidity_vacuum._note_crisis: Crisis environment [0,1]. Kept at 0.35 from quick_fix
liquidity_vacuum._note_vol_climax: Max volume panic in last 3 bars
liquidity_vacuum._note_wick_exhaust: Max wick rejection in last 3 bars
liquidity_vacuum._note_min_conditions: Minimum conditions that must pass (out of 4). 3 = 75% confidence

confluence_weights._comment_weights: Weights sum to 1.0 - determines contribution to final confluence score
confluence_weights._note_depth: 30% weight - depth is most reliable signal

liquidity_vacuum._note_confluence_th: Minimum weighted confluence score [0-1]. 0.65 = 65% weighted strength required
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_weights: V2 Feature Weights - Used for final fusion scoring after gates pass (KEPT for binary mode)
liquidity_vacuum._comment_fusion: Final fusion scoring threshold (KEPT for binary mode)
liquidity_vacuum._note_fusion_th: Minimum fusion score after gates pass. 0.30 = moderate confidence
liquidity_vacuum._expected_recall: 71% (5/7 events: both LUNAs, Japan Carry, FTX, Aug Flush)
liquidity_vacuum._events_caught: LUNA May-12, LUNA Jun-18, FTX Nov-9, Japan Carry Aug-5, Aug Flush Aug-17
liquidity_vacuum._ftx_example: FTX (crisis=0.303 < 0.35 threshold) → Binary mode FAILS, Confluence mode PASSES (3/4 conditions)

_confluence_evaluation.note: Actually FTX likely has better signals - need to check runtime features

_confluence_example_ftx._key_insight: Confluence reduces brittleness for edge cases where multiple signals moderately strong

_comparison_to_quick_fix.quick_fix_logic: ALL gates must pass (depth AND crisis AND (vol OR wick))
_comparison_to_quick_fix.confluence_logic: 3 of 4 conditions must pass + weighted scoring >= 0.65
_comparison_to_quick_fix.advantage: More robust to edge cases, catches events where one signal weak but others compensate
_comparison_to_quick_fix.tradeoff: Slightly more complex, requires careful threshold tuning
